articles.title: Austrian man sentenced to 15 years in prison for plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna - CNN
articles.description: An Austrian court on Thursday sentenced a 21-year-old who admitted planning a foiled Islamist attack on a Taylor Swift concert in Vienna in 2024 to 15 years in prison, finding him guilty of various mainly terrorism-related offenses.
